summary: Iteration 10: Contact form real SendGrid integration + CMS page override + Admin regression tests. All 18 backend tests passed. Contact API is NO LONGER MOCKED - calls real SendGrid (returns 429 quota exceeded). Public page override mechanism properly implemented in code. Admin routes (/admin/pages, /admin/menu, /admin/ai-pages) accessible. Sitemap.xml working.

minor.issue: SendGrid quota exceeded (429) - expected behavior with real integration, not a code issue

critical_code_review_comments: Contact API (/api/contact/send) properly validates payload and calls real SendGrid - NOT MOCKED
SendGrid error handling is excellent - translates API errors to user-friendly French messages
CMS page override pattern correctly implemented in all 9 public pages using getPublicPageOverrideContent()
Public pages gracefully fallback to static content when no CMS page published with matching slug
Admin routes properly require authentication via requireEditorApiUser()

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Contact form shows proper error feedback from SendGrid

context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact form real SendGrid integration verified - returns 429 quota exceeded which proves non-mocked. CMS page override pattern confirmed in code review for all 9 public pages. Admin login works (email: contact@nexus-conseil.ch, password: Greeters&58!2026). Playwright sessions don't persist across automation calls, so admin UI testing requires login in same script.

features_tested.contact_api_not_mocked: PASS - Real SendGrid called, returns quota error (429)
features_tested.contact_form_validation: PASS - Missing/invalid fields return 400 with French error messages
features_tested.contact_form_ui_feedback: PASS - Error message displayed to user after form submission
features_tested.cms_page_override_code: PASS - getPublicPageOverrideContent() correctly checks for published CMS pages
features_tested.sitemap_xml: PASS - Returns valid XML with urlset

mocked_api.note: Contact API is NO LONGER MOCKED - confirmed by real SendGrid quota error response
